channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A new OnePlus Open 2 tease shows just how thin the upcoming foldable will be
item.description: The latest promotional image shared by Oppo puts its upcoming foldable up against the Apple iPad Pro.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Hackers use GenAI to attack more frequently and effectively
item.description: Generative AI is being used in cybersecurity solutions and threats, report claims - so how can your business cope?
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Black Mirror season 7: everything we know so far about the hit Netflix show’s return
item.description: Black Mirror season 7 is coming in 2025 – here's everything we know about the hit Netflix show's return so far.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Musk vs. Altman
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 leak gives us another hint about one of its key specs
item.description: Matching up with previous rumors, a new leak suggests the Exynos 2500 will power the Galaxy Z Flip 7.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How an AI-generated ‘expert’ sank into media deadlines
item.description: Ashley Abramson first came across Sophie Cress in a cold pitch to her work email. Cress was asking to be an expert source for any stories Abramson was working on as a freelance reporter.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Modernizing bp’s application landscape with AI
item.description: One of the oldest and largest oil and gas companies in the world, bp is in the midst of a major transition as it pivots toward becoming an integrated energy company. As part of this transition, the company is aiming for a net-zero carbon footprint by 2050.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta nearly doubling spending with eye toward AI
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced Friday the social media company will nearly double its spending this year as it focuses on artificial intelligence (AI) development. Meta is planning to invest $60 billion to $65 billion in 2025, Zuckerberg said Friday in a post on Facebook.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: FortiGate admins advised to run a compromise assessment
item.description: Network administrators with Fortinet’s FortiGate next generation firewall in their IT environments are being warned to thoroughly scrutinize systems for possible compromise, following last week’s dump of stolen configuration and VPN credentials by a threat actor.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Google pledges to crack down on fake reviews after UK watchdog investigation
item.description: Google is pledging to crack down on fake online reviews with tougher punishments for rogue reviewers and businesses after an investigation by regulators in Britain.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 surprised me with its world map reminiscent of classic RPGs
item.description: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 wears its inspirations on its sleeve with a huge classic RPG-style world map.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New Nvidia RTX 5080 benchmark rumor has got me worried that the GPU won't be a major upgrade to the RTX 4080
item.description: Claimed Nvidia RTX 5080 graphics benchmarks suggest the GPU won’t quite match the RTX 4090 (unlike the RTX 4080 which easily outgunned the 3090).
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Corporate One enables immediate payments with data orchestration hub
item.description: Corporate One Federal Credit Union, headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, is a non-profit that’s provided investment, funding, and payment solutions to their members for nearly 75 years.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Ready or not, here it comes: GenAI in 2025
item.description: If you’re a software developer right now, it is nearly impossible to avoid chatter about generative AI. You’re probably already using AI tools in your work, whether you like it or not. Some of your normie friends are using ChatGPT as a search engine, with hilarious and alarming results.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: World2Meet redefine la asistencia al viajero con un innovador avatar hiperrealista
item.description: En el marco de la celebración de la edición 2025 de Fitur, la capital vuelve a convertirse en una suerte de escaparate de alcance mundial para las empresas dedicadas en cuerpo y alma al sector hospitality.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AMD’s unpatched chip microcode glitch may require extreme measures by CISOs
item.description: Due to a partner disclosure, AMD has found itself in the unenviable position of having to confirm the existence of a major cybersecurity problem in its chip microcode before it could post a fix. But that headache is mild compared to those of their customers’ CISOs.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Ivanka Trump calls out 'fake crypto coin' named after her
item.description: Ivanka Trump, President Trump’s eldest daughter, warned Thursday that a cryptocurrency token bearing her name is fake.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Spain's leader wants the EU to ‘make social media great again.’ Here's how
item.description: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is launching a crusade against what he sees as the downsides of social media.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Wilson And Jamey Keaten, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tips on overcoming the loss of cherished, personal belongings in disasters
item.description: Losing important sentimental belongings — those items that represented who you are — can be traumatic for those who go through disasters that destroy homes.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Pakistan's parliament passes bill with sweeping controls on social media
item.description: ISLAMABAD (AP) — Pakistan’s lower house of parliament on Thursday passed a controversial bill that will give the government sweeping controls on social media, including sending users to prison for spreading disinformation.
item.dc:creator: MUNIR AHMED, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Screen breaks and the right desk setup offer relief from work-related eye strain
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The trouble started every day at around 3 p.m., after Cathy Higgins had spent five or six hours staring at an array of computer screens at her desk. Her university job overseeing research projects involved peering closely at numbers and details on contracts, applications and budgets.
item.dc:creator: CATHY BUSSEWITZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI opposes data deletion demand in India citing US legal constraints
item.description: OpenAI has informed the Delhi High Court that any directive requiring it to delete training data used for ChatGPT would conflict with its legal obligations under US law.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to delete Facebook, Instagram and Threads if you don't like Meta's changes
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Should I stay or should I go — from Meta's social media platforms? That's what some Facebook, Instagram and Threads users are wondering after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's announcement this month that the company is relaxing rules on harmful content such as hate speech and abandoning its
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: Elon Musk is clashing with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over the Stargate artificial intelligence infrastructure project touted by President Donald Trump, the latest in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI's board and is now testing Musk's influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Amazon to close 7 warehouses in the Canadian province of Quebec and eliminate 1,700 jobs
item.description: Online retailer Amazon said Wednesday that it's closing all seven of its warehouses in the Canadian province of Quebec in the next two months. The e-commerce giant said the move would provide “even more savings to our customers over the long run.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: MrBeast not quite in the bidding race for TikTok just yet, rep says
item.description: Jimmy Donaldson — better known online as MrBeast — isn't in the TikTok bidding race just yet, according to a representative for the YouTube star. Donaldson stirred interest in a Jan. 13 post on X saying he’d “buy TikTok so it doesn’t get banned.
item.dc:creator: JAMES POLLARD, HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Rethinking federal RFPs in the age of data and AI: Why energy efficiency must be part of the equation
item.description: Energy efficiency must become a core criterion in federal IT procurement alongside other key factors like cost, performance and security. The post Rethinking federal RFPs in the age of data and AI: Why energy efficiency must be part of the equation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: How to deal with a Big Pile of Mud
item.description: Last week I talked about where those big, unwieldy code bases come from. They don’t appear out of nowhere, and no one ever plans to create one.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump open to Elon Musk buying TikTok
item.description: TikTok restored service to U.S. users Sunday afternoon and credited Trump for pushing to keep the app operational.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: AI experiment in halfpipe judging at X Games will give snowboarders a glimpse into the future
item.description: The X Games will experiment judging halfpipe runs this week in Aspen using artificial intelligence, the cutting-edge technology that could someday play a role in the way subjectively judged sports are scored.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Does your Windows 11 PC keep restarting? Let's fix that frustrating problem
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers Windows 11 restart fixes: Update drivers, run system scans and check hardware.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump, a populist president, is flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Some of the most exclusive seats at President Donald Trump’s inauguration on Monday were reserved for powerful tech CEOs who also happen to be among the world’s richest men.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
